name: Find All Things
short_description: Welcome to the world of puzzles in the new exciting game Find All Things! Play a variety of mini-games in different themed locations, from Japan to a car repair shop. Look for hidden objects, find pairs, solve puzzles, enjoy match-3 games or train your memory, all in one game.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of puzzles in the new exciting game Find All Things! Play a variety of mini-games in different themed locations, from Japan to a car repair shop. Look for hidden objects, find pairs, solve puzzles, enjoy match-3 games or train your memory, all in one game. Complete levels to receive coins that you can spend on collectibles to furnish your room. This game has something fun for everyone!



Embark on an exciting journey with a variety of mini-games and puzzles that will never let you get bored.

The game features:

✔ Play 84 different levels in 21 themed locations
✔ Find hidden objects and match pairs
✔ Relax and unwind with soothing gameplay
✔ Build puzzles and solve various brain teasers
✔ Decorate the room with collectibles
✔ Discover tons of great desktop wallpapers
✔ Listen to game tunes in the music player

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Ukrainian, Portuguese - Brazil
